description: Verify responsive design works at multiple viewport sizes

checks.name: responsive
checks.label: Responsive Design Check
checks.description: Capture screenshots at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports using Playwright
checks.pass: Playwright successfully captures screenshots at all 3 viewports (mobile, tablet, desktop)

failure.userMessage: Responsive design validation failed. Screenshots could not be captured at all required viewports. Verify UI components render correctly at mobile, tablet, and desktop sizes.
